system.benefit: Attack with two ranged weapons as Full Action with -20 penalty
system.description: Years of training allow the character to use a weapon in each hand when needed. When armed with two weapons of the same type, the character may spend a Full Action to attack with both. Both tests made to attack with the weapons suffer a –20 penalty (see Chapter VIII: Combat for more details on fighting with two weapons). The character must possess Two-Weapon Wielder (Melee) and Two-Weapon Wielder (Ballistic) if he wishes to use a gun and hand weapon with this Talent.
